title: Language Candidate
description: A detected language candidate returned by the DetectLanguage API. Contains a BCP-47 language code and a confidence score between 0 and 1.

language.description: BCP-47 language code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'it' for Italian, 'zh' for Chinese).

score.description: Detection confidence score between 0 and 1. Higher values indicate higher detection accuracy.
